jobs.title: Expression of Interest - International School of Ticino
jobs.description:
Inspired Education is the leading global group of premium schools, with a portfolio of 121 premium private schools spanning 6 continents which utilise proven educational practices from every corner of the globe, ensuring over 95,000 students receive a world-class learning experience from Kindergarten to Year 13.

The International School of Ticino (IST) is part of the Inspired Education Group, one of the world's leading premium school groups. Located in Lugano, IST offers a stimulating international learning environment in Ticino.

descriptionByLocale.it: Posizione aperta presso la International School of Ticino a Lugano. Ruolo: Expression of Interest - International School of Ticino. La International School of Ticino (IST) fa parte di Inspired Education Group, uno dei principali gruppi scolastici premium al mondo. Situata a Lugano, IST offre un ambiente di apprendimento internazionale stimolante in Ticino.
descriptionByLocale.en: Inspired Education is the leading global group of premium schools, with a portfolio of 121 premium private schools spanning 6 continents which utilise proven educational practices from every corner of the globe, ensuring over 95,000 students receive a world-class learning experience from Kindergarten to Year 13. The International School of Ticino (IST) is part of the Inspired Education Group, one of the world's leading premium school groups. Located in Lugano, IST offers a stimulating international learning environment in Ticino.
descriptionByLocale.de: Inspired Education ist die führende globale Gruppe von Premium-Schulen, mit einem Portfolio von 121 Premium-Privatschulen über 6 Kontinente, die bewährte Bildungspraktiken aus jeder Ecke der Welt nutzen, um sicherzustellen, dass über 95.000 Studenten erhalten eine erstklassige Lernerfahrung von Kindergarten zu Jahr 13. Die International School of Ticino (IST) ist Teil der Inspired Education Group, einer der weltweit führenden Premium-Schulgruppen. Das IST in Lugano bietet eine anregende internationale Lernumgebung in Tessin.
